title: adenophora triphylla var. angustifolia
intro: Adenophora triphylla var. angustifolia, also known as grand lobelia or Russian lobelia, is a flowering plant species native to East Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Adenophora triphylla var. angustifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Adenophora triphylla var. angustifolia is often prepared in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from respiratory issues.
